title: PixelPop 8x
body:
This is PixelPop, a cute, vibrant 8x texturepack!

I am working on this in my spare time (which I don't have much of) so progress is slow.
it only has a few basic blocks so far.
I'm trying to only use 32-64 colors to give it an 8-bit feel.

Please follow or join my discord server to get updates!
[https://discord.gg/39hqsBey](https://discord.gg/39hqsBey)

Enjoy!


ANNOUNCMENT:
so im thinking about completely redoing the style of my pixel pop
texture pack before i do more to it, please give me your opinion on my discord server!
